Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Jan-05-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF UNITED MEAT COMPANY INC.'S Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is taken off calendar. The moving party failed to provide the court with a valid proof of service of the notice of application and all papers associated with the application at the hearing. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported. =301/PJB
